nodes.name: Lago Escondido
nodes.summary: Lago Escondido是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Dark-faced ground tyrant，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Prosper Garnot
nodes.summary: Prosper Garnot是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Dark-faced ground tyrant、Golden monarch、北岛鸲鹟，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: American Ornithological Society
nodes.summary: American Ornithological Society是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联80种鸟类，包括黑頭鴨、绿翅雁、Chaco chachalaca等80种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Dark-faced ground tyrant
nodes.summary: Dark-faced ground tyrant（Dark-faced ground tyrant，学名 Muscisaxicola maclovianus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联3个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括稀树草原。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The dark-faced ground tyrant (Muscisaxicola maclovianus) is a small passerine bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Argentina, Chile, Peru, Uruguay, the Falkland Islands, possibly in Ecuador, and as a vagrant to Brazil.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The dark-faced ground tyrant (Muscisaxicola maclovianus) is a small passerine bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Argentina, Chile, Peru, Uruguay, the Falkland Islands, possibly in Ecuador, and as a vagrant to Brazil.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In addition, unconfirmed sight records in Ecuador lead the South American Classification Committee of the American Ornithological Society to call it hypothetical there. During the breeding season the dark-faced ground tyrant inhabits open grasslands that have forest nearby or are near rivers and also marshy areas in valleys

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: In addition, unconfirmed sight records in Ecuador lead the South American Classification Committee of the American Ornithological Society to call it hypothetical there.
